{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lyathatan's chains
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Lyathatan's chains]] are described as an unbreakable grasp.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
